messages.text: Q1 final: 103% of plan. Deck ready for review in Drive. Two reps below 70% — need to talk about Tyler Ng before all-hands.
FYI the roadmap doc in Drive is 5 months stale. Notion is source of truth. I'll sync it to Drive this week but don't use the Drive version for board prep.
Gong just acquired ForecastAI. $180M. Let's discuss what this means for our positioning — especially for ClearPath where Gong is in the eval.
messages._noise_note: Thread ends here — 'let's discuss' never happened, no follow-up

messages.text: Quick heads up: the financial model has eng headcount as 19. Sam confirmed it should be 21. I'll fix before the board packet goes out.
ICP v2 rollout is on track for Apr 15. All backend services updated.
messages._noise_note: 'ICP v2' is an internal product term never explained in this channel

messages.text: Ironstone update: David Park confirmed legal has one more redline (data residency, section 8.3). If Jordan can get Sam to confirm EU hosting we're at signature. 👍
messages._noise_note: Thread ends with emoji — no actual decision or owner captured

messages.text: Drexel Partners — proposal sent Mar 14, no response in 12 days. Should I call or give it another week?
messages._noise_note: No reply in thread — question went unanswered

messages.text: Apex Manufacturing — close date was Mar 31. Lena Vasquez went dark after Mar 10. I'm going to push the close date to Apr 30 in Salesforce.
Fortis post-mortem: lost to Gong. Champion Mia Torres left the company. New VP Sales came in with Gong relationship. Lesson: need exec sponsor above champion on deals >$75K.
⚠️ HEALTH ALERT: Omni Logistics — usage down 42% (30-day trailing). Forecast Engine module: 0 logins in 14 days. Action required.
messages._noise_note: Alert posted 12 days ago — no human has replied, no owner claimed

messages.text: ⚠️ HEALTH ALERT: Omni Logistics — usage down 40% (30-day trailing). Forecast Engine: inactive. [DUPLICATE — same event as above, fired from different system]
Crestline mobile sync fix is in QA now — Nina's team targeting Mar 31 deploy. Janet Wu has been patient but I told her we'd confirm by Mar 28.
Northbridge QBR went well yesterday. Greg Holt loves the forecast accuracy improvement. Expansion opportunity: 12 seats × $8K = $96K. Need to formalize proposal.
Salesforce mobile sync fix: PR merged, in QA. Deploying Mar 31 pending QA sign-off.
🔴 INCIDENT: Production rollback completed at 23:50 UTC. Forecast model deploy caused Salesforce sync regression. 4 customers affected ~2 hours. Full postmortem tomorrow.
messages._noise_note: Postmortem link never posted as follow-up

messages.text: Cloud spend spike in Feb: $48K over plan. Caused by new forecast model training runs (larger dataset than estimated). March should normalize.
🎉 CLOSED WON: Northbridge Capital expansion — $45K ACV. Total account now $205K. Greg Holt is a huge advocate.
🎉 CLOSED WON: Crestline Health — $90K ACV. Janet Wu signed on Feb 3. Q1 momentum building!
Q1 done ✅. Thank you all — 103% of plan. More at all-hands Apr 17.
